name: Construct Mapping review for Acceptable Use Operational Training Augmentation Update bundle
summary: Accepted. The staged claim maps each source to the correct acceptable-use construct: operational training augmentation for New Mexico, formative hybrid augmentation for Rezayi, classroom rare-category augmentation for Djagba, and high-stakes detection or stress testing for Wang.

findings.claim_or_issue: Wang et al. belongs in a detection and validity-protection stress-test category, not a scoring-agreement or scorer-validation category.
findings.why_it_matters: A constructed off-topic detection set is useful evidence for tool hardening but should not be read as validation of scoring on regular on-topic responses.
findings.recommended_action: Retain the boundary-condition support role for Wang et al.
